scope: public fixed-window known-target evidence used by the barcode-autopsy product story

datasets.label: SRP009896 / SRR391079 maize GBS inline barcode lane
datasets.comparator_semantics: DotMatch k=0 auto-length fixed-window demux is compared against Cutadapt anchored no-indel demux and a transparent exact-prefix hash splitter under documented SRP009896/SRR391079 semantics.
datasets.claim_boundary: Evidence supports the checked SRP009896/SRR391079 exact-prefix public inline-barcode lane only; broader demultiplexing claims require more datasets and comparator semantics.

datasets.label: 10x TotalSeq-B antibody Feature Barcode R2
datasets.comparator_semantics: DotMatch fixed-window feature assignment is checked against a transparent exact-slice baseline over the 10x feature-barcode window.
datasets.claim_boundary: Evidence supports per-read fixed-window feature-barcode assignment only; it is not cell-level CITE-seq quantification or Cell Ranger feature-count replacement evidence.

datasets.label: 10x GEM-X CRISPR guide-capture R2
datasets.comparator_semantics: DotMatch fixed-window guide assignment is checked against a transparent exact-slice baseline over the observed 10x guide-capture window.
datasets.claim_boundary: Evidence supports per-read fixed-window guide assignment only; it is not guide-per-cell, UMI aggregation, or perturbation-effect analysis evidence.

datasets.label: nf-core viralrecon ARTIC V3 amplicon primer-start R1
datasets.comparator_semantics: DotMatch fixed-window primer-start assignment is checked against a transparent exact-prefix baseline over the selected ARTIC V3 primer window.
datasets.claim_boundary: Evidence supports fixed-window primer-start assignment only; it is not consensus, variant-calling, primer-trimming, clinical, or diagnostic evidence.

datasets.label: Public TruSeq adapter-prefix R1 window
datasets.comparator_semantics: DotMatch fixed-window oligo/adapter assignment is checked against a transparent exact-slice baseline over the selected adapter-prefix window.
datasets.claim_boundary: Evidence supports fixed-window oligo/adapter target assignment only; it is not adapter trimming, primer removal, or general preprocessing evidence.
